title: Berkshire Hathaway begins repurchasing shares, CEO Greg Abel buys $15 million in stock
summary_full: The 62-year-old executive's purchase came a little more than two months into his tenure running the Omaha, Nebraska-based conglomerate.
summary_public: The 62-year-old executive's purchase came a little more than two months into his tenure running the Omaha, Nebraska-based conglomerate.
